final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: social media ad, beauty campaign
Primary request: luxury serum bottle with rose petals and water splash for social media promotion
Scene/backdrop: soft pink gradient background, clean minimal studio setting
Subject: elegant glass serum bottle with pale golden liquid inside, luxurious cosmetic packaging
Style/medium: high-end beauty product photography, editorial commercial
Composition/framing: product shot with dynamic elements, centered composition with surrounding details
Lighting/mood: soft natural lighting, gentle diffused light, luxurious and refined atmosphere
Color palette: soft pink gradient + pale golden liquid + rose pink petals + clear water droplets
Materials/textures: transparent glass bottle with subtle reflections, silky golden serum, delicate rose petals, crystalline water splash
Constraints: maintain luxury aesthetic suitable for social media, keep product as clear focal point
Avoid: harsh shadows, plastic-looking bottle, oversaturated colors, cluttered composition, artificial lighting
